title: oSzoukaua's: Real Height
description: A Datapack/mod that provides a simple chat-based UI to adjust your player height! both in Centimetres and Feet/Inches!
body:
# Description: This Datapack/mod makes a Simple to use and functional Chat-based UI for changing your own player height, with values both in Centimetres and Feet/Inches. You can access this menu by typing "**/trigger height_menu**" You will also recieve a one-time message upon joining a world with this Installed for the first time, notifying you of the functionality, and command.

1.3 Beta notes ### Settings
Enable/Disable a welcome message for players informing them of the datapacks presence, default: false/0 ``` /scoreboard players set welcome_message oszu_rh 1 ```

Disable the use of the ehight menu for players, default: false/0 ``` /scoreboard players set disable_menu oszu_rh 0 ```

Enable/Disable random height assignment for players on initial join of the world, default: false/0 ``` /scoreboard players set random_height oszu_rh 0 ```

Set minimum value for random hight to roll, default: 1 ``` /scoreboard players set random_min_mm oszu_rh 1 ```

Set maximum height for random height to roll, default: 1000 ``` /scoreboard players set random_max_mm oszu_rh 1000 ```

### Re-roll
Re-roll a specific players random height ``` /execute as PLAYERNAME run function oszu_rh:height_logic/randomise_height ```

### NOTE:
you can use @a as a playername, and it will re-roll the height for all palyers currently in the server



## Notes:
Server-Side: meaning that it needs to be installed either on a singleplayer world, or on the server host side






## Other:

You are free to use this pack in modpacks/youtube videos and many other forms of sharing


License: ATTRIBUTION-NONCOMMERCIAL-SHAREALIKE 4.0 INTERNATIONAL
